subject: Monitor display issue - screenshot attached inline
description:
My monitor started flickering around 10am. It happens every few minutes and lasts about 3 seconds each time. Here is a screenshot of what it looks like:

data:image/png;base64,

I've tried switching the DisplayPort cable to a different port and it still happens. The monitor is connected to my docking station. Bloomberg terminal data seems fine, just the display is affected.

subject: SSO login failing across all apps
description:
Hi IT team,

Since this morning I cannot log into any SSO-enabled application. When I try to access Salesforce, SAP, or the internal HR portal, I get redirected to the Entra ID login page and then see:

AADSTS50076: Due to a configuration change made by your administrator, you must use multi-factor authentication to access this resource.

I haven't changed anything on my end. My MFA was working fine yesterday. Outlook and Teams still work because I was already signed in.

Other affected colleagues on my floor have reported the same issue in our Teams channel.


Thanks,
Marcus Rodriguez
Wealth Management | Contoso Financial Services

description:
---------- Forwarded by Patricia Gomez ----------
FYI IT — this is still unresolved. Please prioritize.

---------- Forwarded by David Liu ----------
Patricia, can you forward this to IT? Linda still can't access SAP.

---------- Re: from Linda Park ----------
David, I tried what the help desk suggested but it didn't work. Still getting the same error. This is my third time raising this.

---------- Re: from IT Help Desk ----------
Hi Linda, please try clearing your browser cache and logging in again.

---------- Original message from Linda Park ----------
From: Linda Park <linda.park@contoso.com>
Date: March 14, 2026
Subject: SAP access issue

After my role changed from Finance Analyst to Senior Finance Analyst last week, I lost access to the SAP FI module (transaction codes FB50, F110, FAGLL03). I get error 'No authorization for transaction FB50' when I try to post journal entries. My manager David Liu approved the role change in ServiceNow on March 10. I need this for month-end close which starts March 28.

subject: SQL Server connection timeout errors - logs attached
description:
Our application is throwing SQL connection timeouts. Here are the last 20 lines from the app server log:

2026-03-18 06:01:12.443 ERROR [ConnectionPool] Timeout expired. The timeout period elapsed prior to obtaining a connection from the pool.
2026-03-18 06:01:12.443 ERROR [ConnectionPool] Max pool size: 100, Current: 100, Available: 0, Waiting: 47
2026-03-18 06:01:13.891 ERROR [SqlCommand] A transport-level error has occurred (provider: TCP Provider, error: 0 - An existing connection was forcibly closed)
2026-03-18 06:01:14.002 WARN  [RetryPolicy] Retrying operation, attempt 3 of 5
2026-03-18 06:01:15.112 ERROR [ConnectionPool] Timeout expired. Pool exhausted.
2026-03-18 06:01:15.334 ERROR [ConnectionPool] Max pool size: 100, Current: 100, Available: 0, Waiting: 52
2026-03-18 06:01:16.001 ERROR [SqlCommand] Login failed for user 'svc-app-prod'
2026-03-18 06:01:17.223 FATAL [AppService] Unable to serve requests - all DB connections exhausted

Connection string parameters (sanitized):
Server=sql-prod-eastus2.database.windows.net;Database=ContosoDB;Pooling=true;Max Pool Size=100;Connection Timeout=30;Encrypt=true;

Error counts in the last hour:
timestamp,error_type,count
2026-03-18T05:00,timeout,12
2026-03-18T05:15,timeout,28
2026-03-18T05:30,timeout,45
2026-03-18T05:45,timeout,67
2026-03-18T06:00,timeout,103
2026-03-18T06:00,login_failed,8

This is a production database. Client-facing APIs are failing.

subject: 🚨🚨🚨 HELP 🚨🚨🚨 Room booking system 💻 not working 😱😭
description:
OMG 😱😱😱 I've been trying ALL MORNING to book the big conference room on the 4th floor 🏢 for our team lunch 🍕🍔🥗 on Friday!!!

When I go to Outlook 📧 and try to add the room 🚪 it says 'Room not found' ❌❌❌

I tried:
✅ Searching for 'Conference Room 4A'
✅ Searching for 'Board Room'
✅ Searching for 'Large Meeting Room'
❌ None of them work!!!

My colleague Janet 👩‍💼 said she booked it last week with no issues 🤷‍♀️

PLEASE HELP 🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏

Thanks!!! 💖✨🌟
Chris ✌️

subject: Suspicious emails with tracking links - getting tons of these
description: I keep getting emails with weird tracking links. Here are examples from today: Email 1: From: deals@contoso-special-offers.com Link: https://track.contoso-special-offers.com/click?uid=8f3a2b&campaign=spring2026&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fmalicious-site.com%2Fcapture%3Fid%3D9182 Tracking pixel: Email 2: From: it-admin@contoso-security-update.net Link: https://contoso-security-update.net/verify?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1aWQiOiI4ZjNhMmIifQ.fake_jwt_token Hidden redirect: https://contoso-security-update.net/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcredential-harvest.com%2Flogin Email 3: From: noreply@contoso-benefits-enrollment.org Link: https://contoso-benefits-enrollment.org/enroll?emp_id=45892&utm_source=email&utm_medium=phish&utm_campaign=march2026 These all look like they are impersonating Contoso. I haven't clicked any of them. My colleagues Wei Lin and Tom also got similar ones today.

subject: Teams问题 - crashes every time / 每次崩溃
description:
Hi IT team,

我的Teams一直崩溃。Every time I try to join a meeting, the app freezes for about 10 seconds then crashes to desktop. 这个问题从今天早上开始的。

我试过了:
- Clear cache (删除了 %appdata%/Microsoft/Teams 文件夹)
- Reinstall Teams
- 重启电脑

都没有用。The web version (teams.microsoft.com) works fine, 但是桌面版本 就是不行。I need the desktop app because screen sharing 在网页版上质量很差。

我在新加坡办公室三楼。This is affecting my client meetings.

谢谢,
Wei Lin

description:
